headline: 7MM Asthma Market Insights, Epidemiology, and Market Forecast Report 2022-2036
summary: Opportunities in the asthma market include the growth driven by innovative therapies like dexpramipexole and depemokimab, expanding patient pools due to rising asthma prevalence, and increased awareness and diagnosis rates. Biologics and targeted therapies are reshaping treatment, presenting significant growth prospects in the evolving landscape.Dublin, March 03, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The "Asthma - Market Insight, Epidemiology, and Market Forecast - 2036" has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.
